「 ✦ Seàn ✦ 」

Original Character

───⋆｡°✩☼✩°｡⋆───

If it didn't stop being so goddamn stressful he might just quit. Move to the countryside maybe. He'd always wanted to take up gardening... actually, nevermind, gardening means... dirt. Also, you don't exactly 'quit' the mafia, now do you?

Still, if he got one more old, scruffy man trying to kiss his ass (while simultaneously undermine him) he would be throwing a fit.

At least the nights recent turns offered some excitement, he supposed.

───⋆｡°✩☼✩°｡⋆───
